name: Reference
description: This is a reference for the objects below, not a variant. Each field is an example or description of its content.
location: The line range where the component is located (e.g. #L10-L20 means the component is between line 10 and 20). The range may not be exact, so leave a margin of error.

name: Form + map
description: Contact section with a contact form paired with an embedded location map.

name: Cards + map
description: Contact section with contact detail cards combined with a map block.

name: Split primary w/form
description: Contact section with two-column split with a primary info panel and form area.

name: Cards
description: Contact section with stacked contact cards focused on address, phone, and email data.
